title: Luxury Carved Number Birthday Photo Poster Edit AI
sourceTitle: Luxury Carved Number Birthday Photo Poster Edit AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image luxury carved number birthday poster for Image 1 toddler birthday portrait, preserving the reference facial features inside a premium 3:4 celebration wall design. Subject: Image 1 toddler birthday portrait appears as a happy young child wearing milky white T-shirt and pink denim overalls, laughing naturally while face, shoulder, one hand, and one foot extend through the carved number for a realistic 3D effect. Scene: Premium off-white luxury paper textured wall filled by a large carved number 2 with visible depth, realistic inner shadows, soft pink balloons, subtle white flowers, and elegant bouquet styling inside the number. Composition: Fixed 3:4 vertical birthday poster: off-white wall fills the frame, the large carved number dominates the center, the child emerges from inside the number, and clean wall typography is balanced around the carved shape. Signature Elements: Precisely carved number 2, premium paper wall texture, pink balloons inside the number, white floral arrangement, child breaking through the carved opening, realistic 3D depth, warm sunlight, and luxury minimalist cover polish. Style: Ultra-realistic luxury birthday magazine-cover photography with premium studio art direction, photoreal skin, realistic shadows, clean minimalist layout, and high-end celebration styling. Color Palette: Off-white paper wall, soft pink balloons, white flowers, milky white clothing, pink denim or soft pastel outfit accents, natural skin tones, and warm gold sunlight. Lighting: Warm cinematic sunlight from one side, soft rim light, realistic inner number shadows, sharp focus, and natural premium studio depth. Typography: Wall typography reads MUNONYE, CHAPTER 2, and 365 MORE DAYS OF WONDER in clean elegant birthday-poster lettering. Restrictions: Use only a family-owned, consented, or self-generated child reference;

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
